Paper Core

We have the Manufacturing unit in UAE of Cardboard tubes used in following industries to wind material for storage & distribution. Flexible Packaging, Plastic Films, Textile, PP/PET Strap, Paper, Carpet Adhesive Tapes

READ MORE

Filter Mesh

We are leading manufacturer of Stainless Steel, Wire Mesh Filters for Masterbatch, Polypropylene Yarn, PP spun Bound Fabrics & to industires engaged in extrusion of Plastics, Rubber, Paper Pulp and Sugar Processing Units.

READ MORE

Side Sealing Machine

Micro Processor Control
Side Sealing Machine for plane & printed bags of PP/HM HDPE/LLDPE-LDPE/ZIP LOCK FILMS BOPP/E.P.FOAM & BUBBLE SHEETS SM600 SM 700

READ MORE

Adhesive Tape

We are official partner with worlds largest oil suppliers. Our speciality is oil transport infrastructure.

READ MORE

Paper Core Cutting Machine

Cardboard tubes cut into desired sizes of Customers with fully automatic PLC controlled machine.

Material engineering

Our laboratories are fit to test virtually any material you wish. We cover all needed certificates and issue a warranty for them.

We have the necessary
infrastructure in place to handle the competitive African market.

Introduction

Company’s Vision

“To be the most trusted and sought after solution provider for plastics industry in entire Africa”

Company’s Mission

“To make every relationship worthwhile for our clients by proactively providing them their needs for smooth running of their businesses”

We have the necessary infrastructure in place to handle the competitive African market.
We have a highly motivated trained team. With warehouses at strategic locations and logistics to deliver the orders to the customers at their doorsteps, we are fully equipped to take up any opportunity.

Read More

Aayra International Nigeria Limited

Aayra International Nigeria Limited is part of Aayra Group of companies which has presence in India by name AAYRA INTERNATIONAL, Tanzania by name KARIBU INKS & CHEMICALS, and Congo.
